description: You are a product manager analyzing the profitability of the 'Velo' product line. Management proposes a new fixed marketing campaign costing $25,000. Using the data in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\Financial_Sample.xlsx, determine the break-even volume. Create a simulation table named Simulation_Units with values from 0 to 3000 in increments of 10. Define DAX measures for Fixed_Cost (25,000), Simulated_Revenue (based on the average selling price for 'Velo'), Total_Cost (Fixed_Cost plus the average COGS for 'Velo'), and Simulated_Profit. Generate a line chart visualizing the intersection of Simulated_Revenue and Total_Cost across the Simulation_Units range to identify the break-even point. Save the report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Breakeven_Analysis.pbix.
